name: build-ios-apps
description: Build iOS apps with workflows for SwiftUI UI work, refactors, performance audits, and simulator debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Build, refine, and debug iOS apps with SwiftUI and Xcode workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Build iOS Apps to build or refactor SwiftUI UI, adopt modern iOS patterns such as Liquid Glass, audit runtime performance, and debug apps on simulators with XcodeBuildMCP-backed workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Build or refactor SwiftUI UI, audit performance, adopt modern iOS APIs, or debug an app on a simulator
